chapter_title.en: Al-Ashbaah (literally, "the skeletons"), in which Ali talked about the creation of the universe

text: ومن خطبة له (عليه السلام) تعرف بخطبة الاشباح وهي من جلائل الخُطب (عليه السلام)

en.sayed-ali-raza: This sermon is known as the Sermon of Skeletons [1] (Khuṭbatu ’l-Ashbāḥ) and it holds one of the highest positions among the sermons of Amīr al-mu’minin.
